name: ak-maintenance
description: Full ak knowledge base maintenance pipeline: embed-backfill, dedup, tidy, enrich, snapshot, link-detect. Runs every 3h. Final step triggers ak-digest via ContentMatch.

steps.name: embed-backfill-and-tidy
steps.prompt_template: Run full tidy pipeline: embed-backfill, dedup all projects, tidy all projects, link-detect.

steps.name: enrich
steps.prompt_template: Run enrichment on all projects. Fix miscategorized memories.

steps.name: snapshot
steps.prompt_template: Run embed-backfill and regenerate all project snapshots. End your output with 'ak-maintenance complete'.
